meaning: n.靠近的一边adj.左侧,靠人行道的
examples: There was a dent in the nearside wing.
The driver lost control and veered to the nearside.
The nearside wing was damaged in collision.
It could be that the nearside wheels went on to that area of thicker loose chippings.
Which lane is used - offside lane, middle or nearside - will depend on the road layout.
